text.title: Continuous Discovery Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Continuous Discovery. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Weekly interview slot collapses by week 4 because recruiting was ad-hoc.
antipattern.fix: Stand up in-app prompt + Userinterviews panel + scheduled recruiter agent before week 1.

antipattern.symptom: Agent declares 'insight' from <5 interviews without cross-tag.
antipattern.fix: Reject completions violating N>=5 across >=2 sources; enforce in JSON Schema.

antipattern.symptom: Opportunities accumulate; monthly archival skipped; OST has 80+ nodes.
antipattern.fix: Mandatory monthly kill list; archive parked opportunities to archived-opportunities.md.

antipattern.symptom: Synthesizer conflates interviewer prompts with user statements.
antipattern.fix: Strip interviewer turns from transcript before synthesis; only user turns feed the synthesizer.

antipattern.root-cause: Author used Write instead of atomic append + lock.
antipattern.fix: Use atomic append + lock file; never Write the log.
